subject: [PATCH 2/4] nfsd: use empty string for directory name in NOTIFY4_CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS

2026-05-23.patch_summary: This patch fixes a security vulnerability in the NFSv4 server by ensuring that directory names are not leaked to clients when sending NOTIFY4_CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS events. The code was previously using the actual directory name, which could cause cache confusion and potentially expose local namespace information. To fix this, an empty string is now used for the directory name, as specified in RFC 8881 Section 10.4.3.
